summary: This indicator grew steadily from 164 in FY22 to 232 in FY25. The FY26 figure is a preliminary, partial-year count, and SBS's own reporting shows these in-year figures are typically revised upward substantially as the year progresses -- for example, the agency's initial four-month count for FY25 was later revised from 63 up to 97 -- so the apparent FY26 dip likely partly reflects incomplete reporting rather than a full-year decline.

sources.label: NYC Department of Small Business Services, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
